description: Consolidate duplicated schemas in the GitHub plugin: labelSchema, workflowRunSchema, releaseSchema, and commitSchema are defined in multiple tool files instead of schemas.ts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/github && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Move duplicated GitHub schemas to schemas.ts
userStories.description: Move labelSchema+mapLabel, workflowRunSchema+mapWorkflowRun, releaseSchema+mapRelease, and commitSchema+mapCommit from individual tool files into schemas.ts. Update tool files to import from schemas.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: labelSchema, RawLabel, and mapLabel are defined once in schemas.ts and imported by list-labels.ts and create-label.ts
workflowRunSchema, RawWorkflowRun, and mapWorkflowRun are defined once in schemas.ts and imported by list-workflow-runs.ts and get-workflow-run.ts
releaseSchema, RawRelease, and mapRelease are defined once in schemas.ts and imported by list-releases.ts and create-release.ts
commitSchema, RawCommit, and mapCommit are defined once in schemas.ts and imported by list-commits.ts and compare-commits.ts
No duplicate schema definitions remain in tool files
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/github/src/tools/schemas.ts — add the consolidated schemas
- plugins/github/src/tools/list-labels.ts — remove local labelSchema, import from schemas.ts
- plugins/github/src/tools/create-label.ts — remove local labelSchema, import from schemas.ts
- plugins/github/src/tools/list-workflow-runs.ts — remove local workflowRunSchema, import from schemas.ts
- plugins/github/src/tools/get-workflow-run.ts — remove local workflowRunSchema, import from schemas.ts
- plugins/github/src/tools/list-releases.ts — remove local releaseSchema, import from schemas.ts
- plugins/github/src/tools/create-release.ts — remove local releaseSchema, import from schemas.ts
- plugins/github/src/tools/list-commits.ts — remove local commitSchema, import from schemas.ts
- plugins/github/src/tools/compare-commits.ts — remove local commitSchema, import from schemas.ts

For each schema pair, take the more complete version (they should be identical, but if they differ, keep the one with more fields). Move the Zod schema, the Raw interface, and the mapper function to schemas.ts.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change any schema field names or types — this is a pure refactor
- Do NOT change any tool logic — only the import paths
- Verify both the schema and the mapper function are moved together
